QANGO - live at The Brook, Southampton

Saturday 5th February, 2000

John Wetton - bass & lead vocals
John Young - keyboards
Dave Kilminster - guitars
Carl Palmer - drums

Disc 1

Intro (Fanfare)/Time Again
Sole Survivor
Bitch's Crystal
DK solo (inc. 'Pictures')
The Smile Has Left Your Eyes
All Along the Watchtower
Battle Lines
Walking On Air
JY solo
Only Time Will tell

Disc 2

Hoedown
Last One Home
Fanfare For the Common Man/CP solo
Heat Of The Moment
Don't Cry

Source - MD with Sony Digital Mic > CEP > WAV > FLAC (level 8)
